subject: refactor: remove backward compatibility code from phases 1-3
body:
All removed code handled state shapes that are no longer created:

- Old localStorage key migration (3 previous project names)
- Legacy re-exports in stylePresets.js (stylePresets, styleCategories,
  getFilteredStylePresets) — unused aliases for lookPresets
- imageCell → imageCells fallbacks in 4 files — singular form hasn't
  been created since Jan 2026, all presets use imageCells array
- Pre-multi-page design loading migration (pages, textMode,
  freeformText field patching) — all saves now include these fields

Tags: cleanup, backward-compat, state
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: cleanup
Semver: patch
